modifier.modulargolems.harvest_crop.desc: Auto harvest and replant crops within %s block(s) per Pickup level. Requires Pickup upgrade to work.
modifier.modulargolems.flight.desc: Golem gains creative-style flight. Can move freely through the air.
modifier.modulargolems.potion_aura.desc: Shares beneficial effects with allies every 3s and inflicts harmful effects on hostiles within 48 blocks.
